description:
## Question

How is the superwhisper on/off indicator added to this repo's existing statusline?

The repo's statusline is a pkgs.writeShellApplication in home-modules/settings/programs/claude-code.nix (jq over the Claude Code JSON blob). The reference statusline appends a ✓/✗ superwhisper segment by reading the per-project /tmp flag. Design:
- Merge the indicator into the existing statusline script (must read the same flag convention settled in ticket 4), or keep it minimal.
- Gate the segment on the voice feature so non-voice Macs don't show it.

HITL prototype.
title: Design the statusline SuperWhisper on/off indicator
